_note: Updated site readiness report after all documents received — hydrology study resolved. This supersedes site-readiness-report.json for the second Vera activation check.

required_documents.name: Levantamiento Topográfico
required_documents.rationale: Required for all projects — establishes site boundaries, levels, and contours.

required_documents.name: Estudio Hidrológico
required_documents.rationale: Required due to stream running through the northeast corner. Study confirms: 15m riparian setback from stream centerline per CONAGUA regulations, retention basin NOT required (stream volume within natural capacity), infinity pool siting must respect setback — design adjustment accommodated within approved program.

required_documents.name: Estudio de Mecánica de Suelos
required_documents.rationale: Required for commercial hotel (>300sqm) — slope stability confirmed, foundations to be designed per geotechnical recommendations.

operator_note: All required documents received. Hydrologic study confirms 15m setback — program adaptation in progress. site_docs_complete set to true. Re-dispatching Vera activation_check.
